Operation.value: presidential chair
An ornate chair used by the President for official addresses and meditation. Sitting in the presidential chair may be used as a focus for certain duties and ceremonies.
presidential suite
Presidential address

{ORGANIZER_labelShort} is giving a presidential address from the presidential chair. \nIf all goes well, listeners will feel inspired, and gain respect for {ORGANIZER_labelShort}. If it goes poorly, the address will do social damage. The outcome depends on {ORGANIZER_labelShort}'s social abilities.
presidential address

Initiate a presidential address from the presidential chair. {ORGANIZER_labelShort} will go to {ORGANIZER_possessive} presidential chair and call all colonists to listen. If all goes well, listeners will feel inspired, and gain respect for {ORGANIZER_labelShort}. If it goes poorly, the address will do social damage. The outcome depends on {ORGANIZER_labelShort}'s social abilities.
awful presidential suite
I had to preside in an awful presidential suite. It's like a deliberate insult from my inferiors.
dull presidential suite
I had to preside in a dull presidential suite. It clearly diminished my stature.
mediocre presidential suite
I had to preside in a mediocre presidential suite. It didn't express my stature.
very impressive presidential suite
I presided in a very impressive presidential suite. It expressed noticeable stature.
extremely impressive presidential suite
I presided in an extremely impressive presidential suite. It effectively demonstrated my stature.
unbelievably impressive presidential suite
I presided in an unbelievably impressive presidential suite. The commoners will be amazed at my highness.
wondrously impressive presidential suite
I presided in a heavenly presidential suite. It matched my grace and nobility.
Presidential chair ownership requires a person with a presidential title.
presidential address

Initiate a presidential address from the presidential chair. All colonists will come and listen. If it goes well, listeners will feel inspired, and gain respect for the speaker. If it goes poorly, the address will do social damage. The outcome depends on the speaker's social abilities.
terrible inauguration
The inauguration somehow felt petty and self-indulgent at the same time.
unimpressive inauguration
The inauguration felt mechanical and lifeless.
honorable inauguration
The inauguration brought a sense of dignity and honor to the participants.
grandiose inauguration
The inauguration was like a taste of true grandeur, and a moment of participation in something greater.
